NICER FOUNDATION
Changing Lives, Shaping Tomorrow
Learn More...
SECURITY. EQUALITY. DIVERSITY.
To Change Tomorrow, We Need To Start Now, One Life at a Time.
Learn More...
Previous slide
Next slide

 

WELCOME TO NICER FOUNDATION

We are a pssionate organization that is interested in eradicating poverty through community based initiatives and intervention. We focus on the needs, interests, concerns, expectations and relationships within the various community we work with.

We constantly collaborate with religious bodies, donors and other players to achieve our aims. We are particularly interested in providing education and healthcare to children and individuals that are unable to access basic needs.

We always go where the path leads but explore terrains where there is no path so we can leave a trail for others. We are especially guided by the greek proverbn that says, “A community grows great when old men plant trees in whose shade they know they shall never sit.”

.


Some Facts About NICER Foundatiom

5 Continents


Our Mission

Changing Lives, One Individual at a Time

ENGAGE

To engage the grassroots and future workforce in designing and co-creating innovative approaches to literacy, numeracy, deep learning, problem solving and digital capabilities relevant for the fourth industrial revolution.

CONNECT

To establish strong intentional connections and linkages to governments, schools, work places and communities between Africa and the global economy.

EQUIP

To equip educators and students with critical thinking, problem solving, creative and entrepreneurial skills as a panacea to youth unemployment.



We invest in these three key areas

Education

We create diverse solutions to help develop skills in literacy, numeracy, deep learning, digital education and technology for the future workforce to be globally-responsible.

Development

We are continuously creating intentional connections with government institutions, academic institutions, organizations and communities to connect Africa to the global economy.

Coaching

We are redefining the way educators and students interact with knowledge by empowering students to be a part of the teaching process.

Discover More...
